examples: One day Myanmar will reemerge as a major exporter.
Not until the 19th century did the city again begin to come alive and reemerge from behind its walls.
On the slowly sinking Titanic, there was time for socially determined behavioral patterns to reemerge.
On the other hand, if government encourages job-creating activities, American business will likely reemerge sooner rather than later.
Amid the flotsam and jetsam, there is an internet company ready to reemerge.
